title: deer-flow.council.started v1
description: A deer-query council has been dispatched. Fires at the moment agents are launched, before any results are available. Enables live council UIs and cost tracking from the start of a debate.

question_preview.description: First 80 chars of the question — safe to log without PII risk

agent_names.description: Model/agent identifiers for each dispatched agent

mode.description: free = free model council; genius_tiebreak = deepseek-v4-pro tiebreaker fired
